name: TileMergeImageFilter

members.name: MontageSize
members.detaileddescriptionSet: Set the size of the image mosaic (number of tiles in each dimension).
members.detaileddescriptionGet: Get the size of the image mosaic (number of tiles in each dimension).

members.name: Background
members.detaileddescriptionSet: Set the background value for regions not covered by any input tile.
members.detaileddescriptionGet: Get the background value for regions not covered by any input tile.

members.name: CropToFill
members.detaileddescriptionSet: Set whether the output image is cropped to only include regions covered by input tiles.
members.detaileddescriptionGet: Get whether the output image is cropped to only include regions covered by input tiles.

parent_members.name: SetInputTile
parent_members.detaileddescriptionSet: Set an input tile at a given position or index in the montage.

parent_members.name: SetTileTransform
parent_members.detaileddescriptionSet: Set the transform for a specific tile in the montage.

parent_members.name: SetOriginAdjustment
parent_members.detaileddescriptionSet: Set the origin adjustment for the montage.

briefdescription: Resamples an n-Dimensional mosaic of images into a single composite image.
detaileddescription: TileMergeImageFilter resamples a mosaic of images (tiles) into a single composite image. It supports background filling, cropping to filled regions, and setting transforms for each tile. Inherits montage management and tile input methods from TileMontage.
